notes_for_human_reviewer: RISKS-ONLY FAILURE MODE. Submitter only filled the Risks section — no Assumptions, Issues, or Dependencies. The Risks themselves are scenario-specific and reasonably structured (better than novice_04), but the missing 75% of the framework is a major completeness/differentiation gap. Issues are the most obviously misfiled item — 'training behind schedule' and 'scope creep added 3 endpoints' have already materialised and belong in Issues, not Risks. Tests whether the grader weights the four-category structure as critical to differentiation. Mitigation/ownership are decent within the Risks shown. Risk_completeness expected 2 because items present have detail but framework is 1/4 complete; tolerance 1 because the gap is unambiguous.
